// Filter for windows-composition's bindings.rs (Microsoft.UI.Composition).
// Generated by tool_composition into crates/libs/composition/src/bindings.rs.
// Prune or extend the safe surface by editing this file, then re-run
// cargo run -p tool_composition.

// Fully-qualified to Microsoft.UI.Composition: Windows.winmd also defines a
// member-identical Windows.UI.Composition.* stack that would collide under --flat.
// Only Windows.UI.Color is borrowed from Windows.winmd (the brush color struct).

Microsoft.UI.Composition.Compositor
Microsoft.UI.Composition.ICompositor::{CreateContainerVisual, CreateSpriteVisual, CreateColorBrushWithColor}

Microsoft.UI.Composition.Visual
Microsoft.UI.Composition.IVisual::{put_Offset, get_Offset, put_Size, get_Size, put_Opacity, get_Opacity, put_IsVisible, get_IsVisible}

Microsoft.UI.Composition.ContainerVisual
Microsoft.UI.Composition.IContainerVisual::{get_Children}

Microsoft.UI.Composition.VisualCollection
Microsoft.UI.Composition.IVisualCollection::{get_Count, InsertAtTop, InsertAtBottom, Remove, RemoveAll}

Microsoft.UI.Composition.SpriteVisual
Microsoft.UI.Composition.ISpriteVisual::{put_Brush}

Microsoft.UI.Composition.CompositionBrush
Microsoft.UI.Composition.CompositionColorBrush
Microsoft.UI.Composition.ICompositionColorBrush::{put_Color, get_Color}

Windows.UI.Color

!Windows.UI.Composition
